---
title: "CzechVeg-Open"
format: html
---

CzechVeg-Open is a publicly available, full version of the Czech Vegetation Database, containing all vegetation-plot records included in the database. The taxonomy and nomenclature of plant taxa are not fully harmonized. The data description is available [here](https://czechveg.github.io/Data/data_description.html).

CzechVeg-Open is available in two formats: the Turboveg 2 format, which requires the [Turboveg 2](https://czechveg.github.io/Data/turboveg.html) program, and the CSV format (see the [Data processing tutorial](https://czechveg.github.io/DataProcessingTutorial/data_processing_tutorial.html)).

**Version 1.0**

-   Compiled on: 10 March 2026
-   Size: 117,739 vegetation plots
-   DOI: <https:/doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18289905>
-   Licence: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International ([CC-BY](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/))
-   Download
    -   Vegetation-plot species data in CSV format
    -   Vegetation-plot header data in CSV format
    -   Vegetation-plot data in Turboveg 2 format
    -   [Turboveg species list](https://github.com/czechveg.github.io/About/files/species.zip) (necessary for Turboveg 2)
    -   [Turboveg popup lists](https://czechveg.github.io/About/files/popup.zip) (necessary for Turboveg 2)
    -   [Taxonomic backbone](https://github.com/CzechVeg/CzechVeg.github.io/blob/main/Data/crosswalk_tables/table_nomenclature.csv) (a table for interpretation of taxon concepts and names)
